birds.evidence: |last2=Betton |title=A Checklist of the Birds of Syria |journal=Sandgrouse |issue=Supplement 2 |date=2008 |page=12}} The subspecies soemmerringii occurs in south-central Siberia and extreme northwestern China and is accidental to Hokkaido, Japan. A small number of western jackdaws reached northeastern North America in the 1980s and have been found from Atlantic Canada to Pennsylvania.{{cite book |last1=Dunn |first1=John L
